basic_details.post_name: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Assistant Librarian, Lecturer
basic_details.short_information: AP University has published the Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 1523 Assistant Professor, Professor, Lecturer and More posts through AP University. Apply online by June 08. Salary ₹ 57,700-2,24,100. Check eligibility, age limit, syllabus, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Wise (Master’s Degree, Ph.D., NET/SET/SLET, Library Science, Relevant Discipline)

how_to_apply: Click on the relevant university faculty recruitment link
Register with your email ID and mobile number
Fill in the online application form with personal and academic details
Submit the form and keep a printout for future reference
seo_tags: AP University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 1523 Professor, Lecturer and More Posts
